case_title: WEINSTOCK & SCAVO, P.C. vs. GEERTZ PRINTING COMPANY, INC.

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEINSTOCK & SCAVO, P.C. AS TO DEFENDANT GEERTZ PRINTING COMPANY, INC.

PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEINSTOCK & SCAVO, P.C. SERVED JUN-16-1997, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT GEERTZ PRINTING COMPANY, INC.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GEERTZ PRINTING COMPANY, INC.
